name: Josera Dog- Sensi Plus Adult 12.5kg
shortDescription: Highly digestible food for active dogs. High-quality food for our sensitive athletes. This digestion-regulating yet meaty recipe ensures sufficient energy for increased activity and sport. The highly digestible ingredients also reduce the amount of feces.
description: Composition: poultry (poultry 11.0 %, duck 10.0 %), rice; poultry fat; potato protein; salmon 4.0 %; hydrolysed poultry protein; beet fibre; plant fibre; carob meal; minerals; yeast; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); psyllium husks; dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus). Product Details: Highly digestible food for active dogs. High-quality food for our sensitive athletes. This digestion-regulating yet meaty recipe ensures sufficient energy for increased activity and sport. The highly digestible ingredients also reduce the amount of faeces. . Digestion-regulating fiber complex for active and/or sensitive dogs . Valuable antioxidants support active metabolic tissue and promote vitality . With L-carnitine and taurine to support cardiovascular functions . A great follow-on food from JOSERA SensiJunior thanks to its tailored recipe
